name: Arriyadh Development Co.
summary: Arriyadh Development Co. builds, manages, rents, and sells facilities, commercial and residential buildings, prefabricated buildings, government buildings, service buildings, public parks, and tourism and residential compounds in Saudi Arabia. It also engages in the management, rental, and sale of construction projects, commercial and industrial exhibitions, and renovations of residential and non-residential buildings. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.
